name: ticktick-mcp-bridge
description: Self-hosted TickTick MCP bridge for Codex, ChatGPT, and other MCP clients.

interface.shortDescription: Use TickTick tasks and projects through a self-hosted MCP bridge.
interface.longDescription: TickTick MCP Bridge connects Codex to the TickTick Open API through a local stdio MCP server. The same backend can also be self-hosted as an HTTP MCP endpoint for ChatGPT. Each user brings their own TickTick OAuth app or bearer token; no shared token is included.
defaultPrompt: Show my TickTick tasks for today.
Add a TickTick task for tomorrow.
